---
title: "Co-accessibility plots: high vs low pausing genes (per-gene aggregate, multi-flank)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(GenomicRanges)
})

sample_name <- "AL16_bc2114_18508"
chr <- "chr1"
results_dir <- "/project/spott/cshan/fiber-seq/results/co_accessibility"
fig_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "figures")
dir.create(fig_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

flank_labels <- c("1kb", "500bp", "250bp")
groups <- c("low_pausing", "high_pausing")
group_colors <- c(low_pausing = "#1f77b4", high_pausing = "#d62728")

full_label <- function(label, fl) paste0(label, "_", fl)
sub_dir    <- function(label, fl) file.path(results_dir, full_label(label, fl))

stat_path <- function(label, fl) file.path(
  sub_dir(label, fl),
  paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_", full_label(label, fl), "_CREs_around_genes_coaccess_stat_df.rds")
)
gene_path <- function(label, fl) file.path(
  sub_dir(label, fl),
  paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_", full_label(label, fl), "_CREs_around_genes_per_gene_df.rds")
)
res_path  <- function(label, fl) file.path(
  sub_dir(label, fl),
  paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_", full_label(label, fl), "_CREs_around_genes_coaccess_res.rds")
)
```

## Load per-pair and per-gene tables across flanks

```{r load-stats}
pair_list <- list()
gene_list <- list()
for (fl in flank_labels) {
  for (lab in groups) {
    sd <- readRDS(stat_path(lab, fl)) |>
      dplyr::mutate(group = lab, flank = fl)
    gd <- readRDS(gene_path(lab, fl)) |>
      dplyr::mutate(group = lab, flank = fl)
    pair_list[[paste(lab, fl)]] <- sd
    gene_list[[paste(lab, fl)]] <- gd
  }
}

pairs <- dplyr::bind_rows(pair_list) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    log2OR = log2(OR),
    group  = factor(group, levels = groups),
    flank  = factor(flank, levels = flank_labels)
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(is.finite(log2OR))

genes <- dplyr::bind_rows(gene_list) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = factor(group, levels = groups),
    flank = factor(flank, levels = flank_labels)
  )

cat("CRE pairs per (flank, group):\n")
print(pairs |> dplyr::count(flank, group) |> tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = n))

cat("\nGenes per (flank, group):\n")
print(genes |> dplyr::count(flank, group) |> tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = n))
```

## Plot 1: per-gene mean log2(OR) by group, faceted by flank

```{r plot-pergene, fig.width=8, fig.height=4.5}
wilcox_by_flank <- genes |>
  dplyr::group_by(flank) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    p = {
      h <- mean_log2OR[group == "high_pausing"]
      l <- mean_log2OR[group == "low_pausing"]
      if (length(h) >= 2 && length(l) >= 2) {
        suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(h, l)$p.value)
      } else NA_real_
    },
    n_high = sum(group == "high_pausing"),
    n_low  = sum(group == "low_pausing"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(label = sprintf("Wilcoxon p = %.2g\n(n: %d low vs %d high)", p, n_low, n_high))

y_top <- max(genes$mean_log2OR, na.rm = TRUE)
y_pad <- 0.15 * (y_top - min(genes$mean_log2OR, na.rm = TRUE))

p_gene <- ggplot(genes, aes(x = group, y = mean_log2OR, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.45, scale = "width", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.18, outlier.size = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.08, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_text(
    data = wilcox_by_flank,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y_top + y_pad, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ flank, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = expression("per-gene mean " * log[2] * "(odds ratio)"),
    title = "Per-gene CRE co-accessibility by group, by TSS flank",
    subtitle = paste(sample_name, chr)
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1))

p_gene

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_per_gene_log2OR_by_flank.pdf")),
       p_gene, width = 8, height = 4.5)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_per_gene_log2OR_by_flank.png")),
       p_gene, width = 8, height = 4.5, dpi = 150)
```

## Plot 2: per-pair log2(OR) vs CRE pair distance, faceted by flank

```{r plot-pair-dist, fig.width=9, fig.height=4}
p_pair <- ggplot(pairs, aes(x = dist, y = log2OR, color = group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~ flank, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "CRE pair distance (bp)",
    y = expression(log[2] * "(odds ratio)"),
    color = NULL,
    title = "Per-pair co-accessibility vs CRE pair distance, by TSS flank",
    subtitle = paste(sample_name, chr)
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

p_pair

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_per_pair_log2OR_by_flank.pdf")),
       p_pair, width = 9, height = 4)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_per_pair_log2OR_by_flank.png")),
       p_pair, width = 9, height = 4, dpi = 150)
```

## Combined headline figure

```{r combined, fig.width=9, fig.height=8}
combined <- (p_gene / p_pair) + plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
combined

ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_per_gene_and_pair_by_flank.pdf")),
       combined, width = 9, height = 8)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_per_gene_and_pair_by_flank.png")),
       combined, width = 9, height = 8, dpi = 150)
```

## Fiber-level heatmaps for selected genes

```{r fiber-helper}
fiber_heatmap <- function(gene_name, label, flank_label, max_reads = 200) {
  fl_dir   <- sub_dir(label, flank_label)
  res_file <- res_path(label, flank_label)
  if (!file.exists(res_file)) return(NULL)
  res <- readRDS(res_file)
  pair_list <- res[[gene_name]]
  if (is.null(pair_list) || length(pair_list) == 0) return(NULL)

  # Unique CREs across all pairs for this gene, sorted by genomic position
  all_regions <- do.call(c, unname(lapply(pair_list, function(p) p$regions.gr)))
  all_regions <- all_regions[!duplicated(all_regions$CRE_ID)]
  all_regions <- sort(all_regions)
  cre_levels <- all_regions$CRE_ID

  # Locate the per-gene FIRE extraction directory inside the flank-specific subdir
  search <- list.files(
    fl_dir,
    pattern = paste0("^", sample_name, "_", gene_name, "_chr"),
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  if (length(search) == 0) return(NULL)
  fire_bed <- file.path(search[1], "parsed", "fire.bed")
  if (!file.exists(fire_bed)) return(NULL)

  fire <- data.table::fread(fire_bed)
  colnames(fire) <- c("chr","start","end","RID","score","strand",
                      "x1","x2","rgb","fire_score","hap")
  fire$start <- fire$start + 1
  fire.gr <- GenomicRanges::makeGRangesFromDataFrame(fire, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)

  reads <- fire |>
    dplyr::group_by(RID) |>
    dplyr::summarise(read_start = min(start), read_end = max(end), .groups = "drop")

  cre_min <- min(start(all_regions))
  cre_max <- max(end(all_regions))

  span_reads <- reads |>
    dplyr::filter(read_start <= cre_min, read_end >= cre_max) |>
    dplyr::pull(RID)
  if (length(span_reads) == 0) return(NULL)
  if (length(span_reads) > max_reads) {
    span_reads <- sample(span_reads, max_reads)
  }

  hits <- as.data.frame(GenomicRanges::findOverlaps(fire.gr, all_regions))
  hits$RID    <- fire.gr$RID[hits$queryHits]
  hits$CRE_ID <- all_regions$CRE_ID[hits$subjectHits]
  hits <- unique(hits[, c("RID", "CRE_ID")])
  hits$accessible <- TRUE

  mat <- expand.grid(RID = span_reads, CRE_ID = cre_levels,
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE) |>
    dplyr::left_join(hits, by = c("RID", "CRE_ID")) |>
    dplyr::mutate(accessible = ifelse(is.na(accessible), FALSE, accessible))

  read_order <- mat |>
    dplyr::group_by(RID) |>
    dplyr::summarise(n_acc = sum(accessible), .groups = "drop") |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n_acc)) |>
    dplyr::pull(RID)

  mat$RID    <- factor(mat$RID, levels = read_order)
  mat$CRE_ID <- factor(mat$CRE_ID, levels = cre_levels)

  short_labels <- paste0(
    seq_along(cre_levels), ":",
    sub("^.*\\.", "", cre_levels)
  )

  ggplot(mat, aes(x = CRE_ID, y = RID, fill = accessible)) +
    geom_tile() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "#d62728", `FALSE` = "grey85"),
                      labels = c(`TRUE` = "FIRE+", `FALSE` = "FIRE-")) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = short_labels) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(label, " (", flank_label, "): ", gene_name),
      subtitle = paste0(length(span_reads), " spanning reads, ",
                        length(cre_levels), " CREs"),
      x = "CRE (genomic order)", y = "read", fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          panel.grid = element_blank())
}
```

```{r selected-genes}
# Picked by n_pairs per (group, flank) from the per-gene aggregate.
# To plot a different gene, edit this tibble.
selected <- tibble::tribble(
  ~gene_name, ~group,         ~flank,
  "FUBP1",    "high_pausing", "1kb",
  "GARIN4",   "low_pausing",  "1kb",
  "SH3GLB1",  "high_pausing", "500bp",
  "ENO1",     "low_pausing",  "500bp"
)
selected
```

```{r plot-fibers, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
plots <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(selected)), function(i) {
  fiber_heatmap(selected$gene_name[i], selected$group[i], selected$flank[i])
})
plots <- plots[!vapply(plots, is.null, logical(1))]

if (length(plots) > 0) {
  fiber_combined <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2)
  print(fiber_combined)

  ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_fiber_heatmaps_selected.pdf")),
         fiber_combined, width = 10, height = 10)
  ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_fiber_heatmaps_selected.png")),
         fiber_combined, width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 150)
} else {
  cat("No fiber heatmaps could be drawn (no spanning reads found for selected genes).\n")
}
```

To plot different genes, edit the `selected` tibble above. Any gene listed in
`names(readRDS(res_path(group, flank)))` can be used.
